vocab.example: In tropical climates, car color is vital for thermal absorption; lighter shades keep the interior significantly cooler.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp thanh lịch, không phô trương
vocab.example: I prefer deep navy or charcoal grey because they exude a sense of understated elegance without being too flashy.

vocab.meaning: những ảnh hưởng/hệ quả đối với sự an toàn
vocab.example: The color choice has serious safety implications, as high-visibility tones are less likely to be involved in collisions at dusk.

vocab.meaning: đòi hỏi bảo trì/vệ sinh kỹ lưỡng
vocab.example: While a jet-black finish looks stunning, it is incredibly maintenance-intensive because every minor scratch becomes visible.

vocab.meaning: tâm lý học người tiêu dùng
vocab.example: Manufacturers invest heavily in consumer psychology to determine which seasonal palettes will drive the most sales.
